name: Yucatan Style Swordfish with Spicy Mango Salsa (Gc)
recipeInstructions:
1. About 1 hour before grilling, brush the fish steaks on both sides with the Yucatan Marinade. Cover and refrigerate.
2. Prepare a wood or charcoal fire and let it burn down to embers.
3. Grill the steaks for 3 minutes on each side until medium. Serve topped with 2 tablespoons Spicy Mango Salsa.
Yield: 4 servings
